subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as in these divine days thou hast attained unto the hearing of the word "O My handmaiden!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی طوبی از برای اذن تو چه که در ایام الهی باصغاء کلمه یا امتی فائز شده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for prosperity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
